title: Nothing New
body:

# Features:
- Immersive Vanilla gameplay ⚔️
- New player animations 🏃‍♂️
- Weapon progression 🗡️
- New atmospheric soundtrack ♫
- Amazing forests and caves 🌲
- Vanilla structures 🏰
